protocol.name: sparse4d_normal_scene_human_visible_support_v1
protocol.selection: All Sparse4Dv3 predictions with score >= 0.2 at the first, middle, and final receiver frames of normal_0041 and normal_0138.
protocol.review_views: Up to two HUGSIM RGB cameras with the largest visible projection area for each predicted 3D box.
protocol.reviewer_reference: HUGSIM rendered RGB only; no semantic, depth, internal actor box, or real-world label was used for the decision.
protocol.claim_boundary: Labels record whether the sampled receiver response has human-visible support in the simulated RGB. They do not establish real-world correctness and cannot measure false negatives or recall.

annotations.label: nuisance
annotations.notes: The projected car box covers the lower road edge and blurred curb/ground region; no visible vehicle supports it in either projected view.

annotations.label: nuisance
annotations.notes: The projected car box falls on road surface at the image edge; no visible vehicle supports it in either projected view.

annotations.label: supported_target
annotations.notes: A vehicle is visibly present inside the projected truck box in the front camera.

annotations.label: supported_target
annotations.notes: A pedestrian is visibly present at the roadside shelter inside the projected box.

annotations.label: supported_target
annotations.notes: A pedestrian is visibly present near the shelter inside the projected box.
